stemHtml: For four-engined aeroplanes, the take-off alternate, if required, shall be located (in still air conditions) within:

options.a: 2 hours flight time at one-engine-inoperative cruising speed.
options.b: 1 hour flight time at cruising speed with all engines operating.
options.c: 1 hour flight time at one-engine-inoperative cruising speed.
options.d: 2 hours flight time at cruising speed with all engines operating.
